must_haves.evidence: Candidate has no product management experience. Earliest professional date is Sep 2019 (Data Analyst), giving ~6.7 years total professional experience, but none in product management. Roles are AI Engineer, Data Engineer, Data Analyst, Co-Founder/AI Engineer.
No direct e-commerce or retail experience. Emote is an AI product but not e-commerce. Other roles are in manufacturing quality systems, data engineering, and financial data analysis.

Data Analyst role (Sep 2019-May 2020) involved analyzing financial datasets, building dashboards, SQL ETL. Data Engineer role (Nov 2022-Nov 2024) involved ETL, Power BI, data validation. Skills include SQL, Power BI, Tableau, ETL pipelines.

must_haves.requirement: Proven track record of launching successful products
must_haves.evidence: Co-founded Emote (Apr 2024-Present), built from zero to 450+ users, improved activation and retention. Built production multi-agent AI system at Omnex Systems. However, these are AI products, not traditional product management launches.
No explicit evidence of stakeholder management. Roles involve technical work; no mention of managing stakeholders or cross-functional teams.

nice_to_haves.requirement: Experience in fashion or lifestyle brands
nice_to_haves.evidence: No experience in fashion or lifestyle brands.
Emote is a direct-to-consumer AI product, but no explicit mention of D2C business model knowledge.
Based in Chennai, India. Emote likely targets Indian users? Not explicitly stated. Worked at Indian companies (Positive Integers, SRM University).

hidden_expectations.requirement: Ability to work in a fast-paced startup environment
hidden_expectations.evidence: Co-founded Emote, a startup. Built products from scratch. Experience at Omnex Systems (startup-like).
No evidence of design-centric work. Emote is an AI product, not design-focused. No mention of design collaboration.
Highly hands-on: built AI systems, optimized latency, wrote code, deployed infrastructure. Strong evidence.

day_one_deliverables.evidence: No product management experience; unlikely to have done this.
Strong data analysis skills; could analyze metrics. But no product management context.

seniority_assessment.note: Seniority based on total professional experience, but role mismatch.

evidence_map.recommendation: Candidate is not suitable for Senior Product Manager role due to lack of product management and e-commerce experience.
